title: 小學堂甲骨文資料庫 / Xiaoxuetang Oracle Bone Script Database
scope: Oracle character heads and glyph forms based mainly on Jiaguwen Bian; current landing page reports 2548 character heads and 24701 forms.
download_strategy: Use as the primary external character reference system; download only metadata/derived records unless asset rights are reviewed.
risk_note: Official academic database; automated downloads may be restricted and raw glyph images require source and rights review.

title: 甲骨文合集材料來源表 / Source Table for Collection of Oracle Bone Inscriptions
scope: Heji material source table based on the 1999 printed source table; covers Heji plate/material source references.
download_strategy: Use for inscription/plate provenance; download small documentation and derived metadata only.
risk_note: Official source table; Heji identifiers are plate/material references and not universal character IDs.

title: Oracle Bones Rubbings Database
provider: Fu Ssu Nien Library / Institute of History and Philology Academia Sinica
scope: Oracle bone rubbings held by IHP; overview reports over 40000 rubbings and 21556 digitized records searchable.
download_strategy: Use for rubbing/image provenance and collection-number links; do not bulk download raw images before rights review.
risk_note: Official collection database with explicit site policy; raw image reuse requires policy review.

title: Oracle Bones Collection Page
provider: Museum of the Institute of History and Philology Academia Sinica
scope: Museum collection overview and selected oracle bone artifacts with catalog-style labels.
download_strategy: Use as museum provenance and sample artifact reference; download only small metadata unless image rights are reviewed.
risk_note: Official museum page; image reuse requires museum policy review.

title: 殷契文渊 / Oracle Bones Corpus
provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University; CASS Oracle Studies Center
scope: Integrated oracle-bone platform with glyph, catalog, literature and knowledge-service sections.
download_strategy: Adopt as a professional discovery and cross-reference source; do not bulk download documents/images because the site disclaimer reports mixed third-party material.
risk_note: Professional and important platform, but rights status is mixed; use metadata and cross-check against institutional/catalog sources.

title: HUST-OBC: An open dataset for oracle bone character recognition and decipherment
provider: Huazhong University of Science and Technology research team / Scientific Data
scope: Scientific Data dataset with 77064 images of 1588 deciphered characters and 62989 images of 9411 undeciphered characters; total 140053 images.
download_strategy: Register as large source package; do not commit raw dataset; extract indexes and derived metadata after license/source review.
risk_note: Dataset is directly relevant to 1500+ deciphered and undeciphered characters, but raw images are large and compiled from diverse sources.

title: OBIMD: Oracle Bone Inscriptions Multi-modal Dataset
provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University; Xiamen University; Tencent Youtu Lab; University of Cambridge; Scientific Data
scope: Multi-modal OBI dataset with 10077 oracle bone images, 93652 annotated characters, 21941 syntactically validated sentences, and reading sequences.
download_strategy: Download dataset card and code README; do not bulk download raw images before source/rights/size review.
risk_note: Dataset card reports CC-BY 4.0; raw multi-modal files are large and should be handled through large-source workflow.

title: Open-Oracle project repository
scope: Project hub linking HUST-OBC, EVOBC, OBSD and related oracle-bone AI research resources.
download_strategy: Download README metadata and use links to identify dataset/source packages; do not treat as primary paleographic authority by itself.
risk_note: Useful for locating academic datasets; underlying dataset rights and source chains must be reviewed separately.

title: Oracle-MNIST dataset
provider: Published research team / GitHub / Figshare / Science Data Bank
scope: Small benchmark dataset of oracle character images for machine learning; not a comprehensive decipherment corpus.
download_strategy: Register for AI benchmarking only; do not use as source of scholarly decipherment claims.
risk_note: Useful for recognition tests but too narrow for corpus construction.

title: GBEDOBC graph-based evolutionary dataset
provider: Qingju Jiao et al. / npj Heritage Science / GitHub
scope: Graph-based evolutionary dataset linking oracle bone characters to later scripts.
download_strategy: Register as a candidate for evolution-chain experiments; review data fields and rights before import.
risk_note: Useful for graph/evolution research but not a primary corpus authority.

title: 甲骨世界 / Oracle Bones Database
provider: National Library of China / Chinese Ancient Books Resource Platform
scope: National Library of China oracle-bone holdings and related digital resources; exact open endpoint needs manual confirmation.
download_strategy: Register for follow-up discovery; identify stable official endpoint before downloading records.
risk_note: Official institution but current stable oracle-bone endpoint still needs confirmation; do not use mirrored library summaries as primary data.
